creator: mita@iis.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
Makefile of jp-pkfonts${RESOLUTION}-1.0 calls csh script
${SCRIPTDIR)/${RESOLUTION}.list without /bin/csh.

Fix: A patch is included below. This patch also fixes `cp' -> `${CP}, and 
`rm'-> `${RM}'.
	
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/japanese/pkfonts
chmod a-x scripts/300.install
setenv RESOLUTION 300
make install
